caveat: Countries measure debt differently. This comparison uses general government gross debt as a share of GDP, the most consistent measure available internationally. The UK's headline national measure (net debt, about 94% of GDP) is lower and not directly comparable. Debt is the IMF's 2025 estimate; deficit and growth are 2024 outturn (the latest full year). All figures are from the IMF World Economic Outlook.
measure: General government gross debt (% of GDP)
